E_SCHEMA_INVALID.suggestion: Fix request schema and resubmit. Ensure required fields are present with correct types; use get_tool_schema, and for planner_execute_mcp prefer the provided minimal template + canonical block_spec fields.

E_SSOT_SCHEMA_INVALID.suggestion: Fix SSOT payload fields using get_tool_schema/get_write_contract_bundle, then retry.

E_SSOT_DESERIALIZE_FAILED.suggestion: Payload JSON cannot be deserialized by SSOT DTO. Check field types and required keys from get_tool_schema.

E_SSOT_TOOL_UNSUPPORTED.suggestion: Tool is not supported by current SSOT runtime. Refresh tools/list and use an active tool name.

E_SSOT_ROUTE_FAILED.suggestion: SSOT route dispatch failed. Re-check Unity connection and retry with a validated payload from get_write_contract_bundle/get_tool_schema.

E_SSOT_EXECUTION_FAILED.suggestion: SSOT execution failed in Unity runtime. Inspect error_message, adjust payload, and retry once if safe.

E_TRANSACTION_CONTEXT_INVALID.suggestion: Transaction context is invalid. Ensure execution_mode/idempotency_key/based_on_read_token/write_anchor_* are present.

E_INTERNAL.suggestion: Internal sidecar/runtime error. Check sidecar and Unity logs, then retry after runtime state is healthy.

E_CONTEXT_DEPTH_VIOLATION.suggestion: Set context.selection_tree.max_depth to 2 and retry submit_unity_task.

E_READ_REQUIRED.suggestion: Call get_current_selection (or get_gameobject_components) first and submit with based_on_read_token.

E_PRECONDITION_FAILED.suggestion: Refresh Unity state, adjust preconditions (object/component/compile_idle), then retry the write tool.

E_SELECTION_UNAVAILABLE.suggestion: Ensure Unity editor is connected and has pushed a recent selection snapshot, then retry MCP read tools.

E_UNITY_NOT_CONNECTED.suggestion: Wait until Unity connection state is ready (runtime ping + capability report), then retry write tools.

E_CONTRACT_VERSION_MISMATCH.suggestion: Refresh capability contracts (get_write_contract_bundle or get_action_schema/get_action_catalog), then retry write payload with latest catalog_version when Unity state is ready.

E_SCREENSHOT_VIEW_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Switch to an available Scene/Game view in Unity Editor, then retry capture_scene_screenshot.

E_SCREENSHOT_CAPTURE_FAILED.suggestion: Screenshot capture failed. Check Unity editor state and retry; lower resolution if needed.

E_CAPTURE_MODE_DISABLED.suggestion: capture_scene_screenshot currently keeps render_output as baseline. If you need composite, enable CAPTURE_COMPOSITE_ENABLED + UNITY_CAPTURE_COMPOSITE_ENABLED; otherwise retry with render_output after get_ui_overlay_report.

E_COMPOSITE_BUSY.suggestion: Another composite capture is running. Wait for it to finish, then retry capture_scene_screenshot(capture_mode=composite).

E_COMPOSITE_PLAYMODE_REQUIRED.suggestion: Composite capture currently requires Unity Play Mode. Enter Play Mode or fallback to capture_mode=render_output.

E_COMPOSITE_CAPTURE_RESTRICTED.suggestion: Composite EditMode capture was restricted by safety guard. Retry with capture_mode=render_output and inspect get_ui_overlay_report.

E_UI_OVERLAY_REPORT_SOURCE_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Overlay UI source was not found. Ensure target Canvas exists and retry get_ui_overlay_report.

E_UI_OVERLAY_REPORT_QUERY_FAILED.suggestion: Overlay report query failed. Check Unity editor state and retry get_ui_overlay_report with lower max_nodes/budgets if needed.

E_UI_TREE_SOURCE_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: UI root/source was not found. Ensure target Canvas/UIDocument exists, then retry get_ui_tree.

E_UI_TREE_QUERY_FAILED.suggestion: UI tree query failed. Check Unity editor state and retry get_ui_tree with lower depth/budget if needed.

E_UI_HIT_TEST_SOURCE_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: UI hit test source is unavailable. Ensure Game view + EventSystem + GraphicRaycaster are active, then retry hit_test_ui_at_viewport_point.

E_UI_HIT_TEST_QUERY_FAILED.suggestion: UI hit test failed. Verify viewport point and resolution mapping, then retry hit_test_ui_at_viewport_point.

E_UI_COORD_MAPPING_INVALID.suggestion: Coordinate mapping is invalid. Check coord_space/coord_origin and ensure x/y are in valid range, then retry hit_test_ui_at_viewport_point.

E_UI_RUNTIME_RESOLUTION_UNAVAILABLE.suggestion: Runtime resolution is unavailable. Provide resolution explicitly or ensure scope points to an active Canvas, then retry.

E_UI_LAYOUT_VALIDATION_FAILED.suggestion: UI layout validation failed. Reduce scope or issue budgets, then retry validate_ui_layout.

E_UI_LAYOUT_SCOPE_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: UI layout scope root was not found. Verify scope.root_path and retry validate_ui_layout.

E_UI_LAYOUT_PARTIAL.suggestion: Layout validation returned partial results due to budget. Increase time_budget_ms/max_issues or narrow scope and retry.

E_COMMAND_DISABLED.suggestion: This command is currently disabled. Use tools/list for current availability and prefer get_ui_overlay_report + get_ui_tree + capture_scene_screenshot(render_output).

E_TARGET_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Use get_current_selection to confirm target_path, then call get_gameobject_components again.

E_COMPONENT_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Target component is missing. Query component list first, then retry with a valid component_type/assembly-qualified name.

E_COMPONENT_TYPE_INVALID.suggestion: Component type format is invalid. Use assembly-qualified type name and verify with get_gameobject_components/get_tool_schema.

E_COMPONENT_ADD_FAILED.suggestion: Component add failed due to Unity constraint. Check target object type and component compatibility, then retry once.

E_OBJECT_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Target object no longer exists. Refresh anchors via read tool and retry with latest object_id/path.

E_INVALID_PARENT.suggestion: Parent anchor is invalid. Re-read hierarchy and ensure parent_object_id/parent_path are consistent before retry.

E_SCENE_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Scene path is invalid or unavailable. Confirm scene path from scene roots and retry.

E_SCENE_NOT_LOADED.suggestion: Scene is not loaded in editor. Load/open the target scene first, then retry write/save operation.

E_SCENE_SAVE_FAILED.suggestion: Scene save failed. Check scene write permissions and unsaved asset conflicts, then retry save_scene.

E_JOB_CONFLICT.suggestion: 写请求提交后必须轮询 get_unity_task_status，直到状态进入 succeeded/failed/cancelled；accepted/queued 仅表示已受理。 Use running_job_id to track the running task, then retry after terminal.

E_TOO_MANY_ACTIVE_TURNS.suggestion: 写请求提交后必须轮询 get_unity_task_status，直到状态进入 succeeded/failed/cancelled；accepted/queued 仅表示已受理。 Wait for the active turn to become terminal, or cancel it before submitting another job.

E_FILE_PATH_FORBIDDEN.suggestion: Write files only under Assets/Scripts/AIGenerated and retry with a safe path.

E_FILE_SIZE_EXCEEDED.suggestion: Reduce file content size below the configured sidecar maxFileBytes limit and retry.

E_FILE_EXISTS_BLOCKED.suggestion: Use overwrite_if_exists=true or choose a new file path before retrying.

E_ACTION_COMPONENT_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Query available components on target, then retry with a valid component name/type.

E_ACTION_HANDLER_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Call tools/list (or get_action_schema) to confirm supported action_type, then retry with a registered handler.

E_ACTION_DESERIALIZE_FAILED.suggestion: Fix action_data to match the handler DTO schema. Use get_action_schema for exact field names/types before retry.

E_ACTION_PAYLOAD_INVALID.suggestion: Action payload shape is invalid. Refresh schema via get_action_schema and resubmit with valid action_data + anchors.

E_ACTION_RESULT_MISSING_ERROR_CODE.suggestion: Unity action failed without explicit error_code. Check Unity-side handler error mapping and retry after logs are fixed.

E_ACTION_CAPABILITY_MISMATCH.suggestion: Requested action is not in current Unity capability set. Refresh tools/list and retry with a supported action_type.

E_ACTION_DATA_STRINGIFIED_NOT_ALLOWED.suggestion: Do not send stringified action_data fields. Send action_data as a JSON object and retry.

E_ACTION_PROPERTY_WRITE_RESTRICTED.suggestion: Target property is write-restricted in set_serialized_property (for example ManagedReference/AnimationCurve). Use get_serialized_property_tree to inspect writable fields, then retry with supported paths.

E_COMPOSITE_PAYLOAD_INVALID.suggestion: Fix composite action_data/steps schema (step_id, anchors, bind_outputs) and retry. Use get_action_schema when unsure.

E_COMPOSITE_ALIAS_INVALID.suggestion: Alias name or anchor_ref usage is invalid. Use lower_snake_case aliases and keep *_anchor with *_anchor_ref mutually exclusive.

E_COMPOSITE_ALIAS_DUPLICATED.suggestion: Each alias can be bound only once in a transaction. Rename duplicated aliases and retry.

E_COMPOSITE_ALIAS_FORWARD_REF.suggestion: Alias references must point to outputs of previous steps only. Reorder steps or remove forward refs.

E_COMPOSITE_ALIAS_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Alias was not found at execution time. Ensure bind_outputs succeeded before referencing target_anchor_ref/parent_anchor_ref.

E_COMPOSITE_ALIAS_INLINE_REF_UNSUPPORTED.suggestion: Inline alias interpolation in action_data is not supported in v1. Split into separate steps or wait for AliasResolver upgrade.

E_COMPOSITE_BUDGET_EXCEEDED.suggestion: Composite budget exceeded limits. Reduce step count/max_step_ms or split the task into smaller transactions.

E_COMPOSITE_STEP_FAILED.suggestion: A composite step failed and transaction rolled back. Fix the failing step payload and retry the whole transaction.

E_COMPOSITE_ROLLBACK_INCOMPLETE.suggestion: Rollback integrity failed and write circuit is closed. Inspect Unity logs and recover editor state before retrying.

WAITING_FOR_UNITY_REBOOT.suggestion: Wait for unity.runtime.ping recovery, then retry the pending visual action.

E_WAITING_FOR_UNITY_REBOOT.suggestion: Wait for unity.runtime.ping recovery, then retry the pending visual action.

E_JOB_HEARTBEAT_TIMEOUT.suggestion: Heartbeat lease expired. Re-check job status, refresh context, and resubmit with a new idempotency_key if needed.

E_JOB_MAX_RUNTIME_EXCEEDED.suggestion: Job exceeded max runtime. Split the task into smaller actions and resubmit.

E_WAITING_FOR_UNITY_REBOOT_TIMEOUT.suggestion: Unity reboot recovery timed out. Confirm editor compile health, then resubmit and poll get_unity_task_status until terminal.

E_JOB_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Verify job_id and thread scope before polling or cancelling.

E_WORKFLOW_TEMPLATE_INVALID.suggestion: Workflow template is invalid for current planner request. Check workflow step definitions and retry planner_execute_mcp with a valid block_spec.

E_WORKFLOW_JOB_ID_MISSING.suggestion: Workflow cannot continue because job_id is missing from submit step. Re-run planner_execute_mcp and poll get_unity_task_status after submit.

E_WORKFLOW_WAIT_STATUS_FAILED.suggestion: Workflow task reached failed terminal status. Check get_unity_task_status terminal_error_code/terminal_error_message, fix payload, then retry planner_execute_mcp.

E_WORKFLOW_ENSURE_TARGET_FAILED.suggestion: Workflow ensure_target step failed. Check ensure_target.parent_anchor/new_object_name/object_kind and retry planner_execute_mcp.

E_WORKFLOW_ENSURE_TARGET_AMBIGUOUS_REUSE.suggestion: Workflow ensure_target reuse matched multiple candidates. Refresh hierarchy and make reuse target deterministic before retry.

E_WORKFLOW_RESOLVED_TARGET_CONFLICT.suggestion: Workflow resolved_target conflicts with explicit attach target. Align to resolved_target and retry planner_execute_mcp.

E_WORKFLOW_RESOLVED_TARGET_MISSING.suggestion: Workflow attach is missing resolved_target. Ensure ensure_target returns target_object_id/target_path, then retry planner_execute_mcp.

E_WORKFLOW_SCRIPT_COMPILE_FAILED.suggestion: Script compile failed during workflow. Inspect get_unity_task_status error details, fix script/compiler errors, then retry planner_execute_mcp.

E_WORKFLOW_SCRIPT_CLASS_MISMATCH.suggestion: Script class name/type mismatch. Ensure file name, class name, and component_type are consistent, then retry planner_execute_mcp.

E_WORKFLOW_COMPONENT_NOT_ATTACHABLE.suggestion: Compiled script/component is not attachable on current target. Verify target object and component type, then retry planner_execute_mcp.

E_WORKFLOW_COMPILE_WAIT_TIMEOUT.suggestion: Compile wait timed out. Poll get_unity_task_status, cancel_unity_task if still running, then retry planner_execute_mcp.

E_WORKFLOW_TASK_CANCELLED.suggestion: Workflow task was cancelled before completion. Check get_unity_task_status for terminal reason, then resubmit planner_execute_mcp.
